payload.text: 花神这边只要我提问现在几乎看不到了这里的粒子系统 其他的粒子系统不要

**Initiating Display Modifications**

I'm currently working on modifying the "Twelve Flower Goddesses" display page as requested.  My focus is on incorporating the "Goddess of Hundred Flowers" before the existing goddesses. I will also be sure to remove any existing particle systems for the other goddesses so that only the "Goddess of Hundred Flowers" will have an associated particle system.


**Adjusting Particle Visibility**

I'm now implementing the plan to disable particle effects for the twelve flower goddesses. In `App.tsx`, I'm adding a conditional check based on the `selectedGoddess.id`. If it's not "hundred-flowers", the particle overlays are hidden or disabled. Also, verifying the order of goddesses in `constants.ts` is in progress. The existing data confirms the desired hierarchy.


**Analyzing Particle System Behavior**

I'm now revisiting the particle system implementation, focusing on the 百花女神 (Hundred Flowers Goddess). The user's request, initially interpreted as *removing* particles from all but the Hundred Flowers Goddess, is now being clarified. The provided code reveals the `AtmosphereOverlay` is always present. The goal now is to align the rendering with the user's intent to selectively show particle effects based on the selected goddess, making the system visible only for the Hundred Flowers Goddess.


**Prioritizing Particle Effects**

I've been examining the current overlay implementation. My latest focus is on the `PetalOverlay` and `ButterflyOverlay` conditions. They're presently set to 'none' or 'general' depending on the goddess. The user wants the 百花女神 to exclusively have particle effects. I'm now making it so the `PetalOverlay` and `ButterflyOverlay` are only present if `selectedGoddess.id` is 'hundred-flowers'. I'll update `App.tsx` and verify `constants.ts` is correctly prioritizing the 百花女神 at index 0. This refines the desired visual presentation of the goddesses.


**Clarifying Particle Exclusion**

I'm now zeroing in on the particle system behavior. The plan is to ensure only the hundred-flowers goddess has particle effects. I'm focusing on making `<PetalOverlay />` only render if `selectedGoddess.id === 'hundred-flowers'`. Based on user feedback, I'm removing the atmosphere, petals, and butterflies from the other goddesses to ensure the minimalist look requested. I've re-confirmed that `constants.ts` prioritizes the 百花女神. I'm also considering a more grand entrance for this goddess as well.


**Finalizing Particle Exclusivity**

I'm now implementing the final adjustments to ensure that only the 百花女神 displays particle effects. The user's feedback makes it clear that other goddesses should have no particle systems. I'm focusing on modifying `App.tsx` and limiting `PetalOverlay` to render exclusively for the "hundred-flowers" goddess. This ensures a minimalist look, as requested, while giving the spotlight to 百花女神.


**Refining Visual Presentation**

I'm now revising the particle effect implementation. It seems the user wants the particle system *visible* for the 百花女神 but *absent* for the others. My priority is now to modify `App.tsx` and ensure `AtmosphereOverlay`, `PetalOverlay`, and `ButterflyOverlay` components render *only* when `selectedGoddess.id === 'hundred-flowers'`. I'll also ensure that the visual data for 百花女神 is robust. I'll need to check the current logic around the atmosphere to ensure all the effects are correct now.


**Emphasizing Visual Simplicity**

I'm now focusing on a more minimalist presentation for the twelve flower goddesses (excluding hundred-flowers). The plan involves disabling particle overlays for goddesses 1-12 to maintain visual clarity on the image and text. I'm prioritizing the 百花女神 as the entry point in `constants.ts`, and I'll update her description to underscore her leading role. I'm also planning a smooth transition, quieting the atmosphere to highlight the shift to individual seasonal spirits, post-hundred-flowers introduction.

entries.description: 修改粒子系统展示逻辑：仅在“百花女神”界面显示粒子、花瓣和蝴蝶效果，十二花神界面保持纯净无粒子状态。
强化“百花女神”作为系列开篇的设定，完善其粒子系统配置。

diffs.replacement:
import { Goddess } from './types';

export const GODDESS_DATA: Goddess[] = [
  {
    id: 'hundred-flowers',
    name: '百花女神',
    title: '众芳之首 · 司春元君',
    flower: '万卉之灵',
    description: '端坐于紫藤瀑布之下的众灵之源。她青丝如瀑，手抚琉璃竖琴，指尖轻拨间，天籁琴音化作万物复苏的敕令。她是幻境中一切生命的源头，统领十二月令花神。每当她弹响琴弦，整片幻境便会充盈着梦幻的迷雾与灵动的流光。',
    shortDesc: '琉璃拨弦，万卉齐开。作为幻境之母，她统领群芳，开启芳华。',
    image: './goddess-hundred.jpg', 
    pvUrl: 'https://www.bilibili.com',
    color: '#D4B3FF', // 梦幻紫金
    type: 'HUNDRED',
    particleType: 'MIST' 
  },
  {
    id: 'plum-blossom',
    name: '梅花花神',
    title: '一月花神 · 傲雪凌霜',
    flower: '梅花',
    description: '寒冬腊月，众芳摇落。梅花女神独守孤傲，在风雪中吐露清芬。她代表着坚韧与高洁，是文人墨客心中永恒的傲骨。',
    shortDesc: '一朵忽先变，百花皆后香。',
    image: './goddess-01.jpg',
    color: '#FFC1E3',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'FROST' 
  },
  {
    id: 'apricot-blossom',
    name: '杏花花神',
    title: '二月花神 · 娇红万点',
    flower: '杏花',
    description: '二月春寒料峭，杏花如烟。杏花女神轻盈曼妙，她所到之处，微雨含情。',
    shortDesc: '沾衣不湿杏花雨，吹面不寒杨柳风。',
    image: './goddess-02.jpg',
    color: '#FFEBEE',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'GLIMMER' 
  },
  {
    id: 'peach-blossom',
    name: '桃花花神',
    title: '三月花神 · 夭夭灼灼',
    flower: '桃花',
    description: '三月桃花灼灼其华。桃花女神代表着最炽热的青春与生命力，人面桃花相映红。',
    shortDesc: '桃花灼灼，满山红遍，尽显春意烂漫。',
    image: './goddess-03.jpg',
    color: '#FF8A80',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'GLIMMER'
  },
  {
    id: 'peony',
    name: '牡丹花神',
    title: '四月花神 · 国色天香',
    flower: '牡丹',
    description: '谷雨时节，牡丹盛开。作为百花之王，牡丹女神雍容华贵，仪态万千。',
    shortDesc: '唯有牡丹真国色，花开时节动京城。',
    image: './goddess-04.jpg',
    color: '#F06292',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'GLIMMER' 
  },
  {
    id: 'pomegranate',
    name: '石榴花神',
    title: '五月花神 · 榴红似火',
    flower: '石榴花',
    description: '五月榴花照眼明。石榴女神热情如火，身披红裙，象征着生命力的勃发与繁荣。',
    shortDesc: '微雨过，小荷翻，石榴花下即清凉。',
    image: './goddess-05.jpg',
    color: '#FF5252',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'GLIMMER' 
  },
  {
    id: 'lotus',
    name: '荷花花神',
    title: '六月花神 · 出水芙蓉',
    flower: '荷花',
    description: '六月盛夏，莲叶田田。荷花女神清净无染，于炎阳之下送来阵阵清幽。',
    shortDesc: '出淤泥而不染，濯清涟而不妖。',
    image: './goddess-06.jpg',
    color: '#80CBC4',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'MIST' 
  },
  {
    id: 'hollyhock',
    name: '蜀葵花神',
    title: '七月花神 · 向阳倾心',
    flower: '蜀葵',
    description: '七月流火，蜀葵挺拔。蜀葵女神向阳而生，颜色明丽。',
    shortDesc: '五色蜀葵花，向阳心不改。',
    image: './goddess-07.jpg',
    color: '#EC407A',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'GLIMMER'
  },
  {
    id: 'osmanthus',
    name: '桂花花神',
    title: '八月花神 · 蟾宫折桂',
    flower: '桂花',
    description: '中秋时节，月桂飘香。桂花女神自带金粟，香气袭人。',
    shortDesc: '桂子月中落，天香云外飘。',
    image: './goddess-08.jpg',
    color: '#FFB300',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'GLIMMER' 
  },
  {
    id: 'chrysanthemum',
    name: '菊花花神',
    title: '九月花神 · 采菊东篱',
    flower: '菊花',
    description: '秋霜既降，百花凋零。菊花女神淡泊名利，在寒风中独吐芬芳。',
    shortDesc: '采菊东篱下，悠然见南山。',
    image: './goddess-09.jpg',
    color: '#FFD54F',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'FIREFLY' 
  },
  {
    id: 'hibiscus',
    name: '芙蓉花神',
    title: '十月花神 · 拒霜清绝',
    flower: '芙蓉',
    description: '芙蓉女神在深秋绽放，被称为“拒霜花”。她娇艳而不妖。',
    shortDesc: '千林扫作一番黄，只有芙蓉独自芳。',
    image: './goddess-10.jpg',
    color: '#F48FB1',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'GLIMMER'
  },
  {
    id: 'camellia',
    name: '山茶花神',
    title: '十一月花神 · 雪里开花',
    flower: '山茶',
    description: '山茶女神端庄大方，历经严寒而常绿。',
    shortDesc: '雪里开花到春晚，世间耐久孰如君.。',
    image: './goddess-11.jpg',
    color: '#E91E63',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'FROST'
  },
  {
    id: 'narcissus',
    name: '水仙花神',
    title: '十二月花神 · 凌波仙子',
    flower: '水仙',
    description: '岁末隆冬，水仙凌波。水仙女神清雅脱俗，在一勺清水中绽放出最洁净的花朵。',
    shortDesc: '借水开花自一奇，水沉为骨玉为肌。',
    image: './goddess-12.jpg',
    color: '#E0F2F1',
    type: 'TWELVE',
    particleType: 'FROST'
  }
];
